Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

John C. Josefsberg, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Marriott Hotel Services, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Santa Clara Marriott and Betesda Marriot.
Olga Malikova, the Assistant Controller for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Microcast Communications, Inc.
Amended Default entered against defendant on June 25, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Marriott Hotel Services, Inc., a Delaware corporation, dba Santa Clara Marriott, and Betesda Marriot and against the Defaulted Defendant Microcast Communications, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $182,219.68.
Prejudgment Interest - $20,881.46.
Attorney's Fees - $20,590.82.
Costs - $310.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $224,101.96.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
